title: Shield trio
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''shield trio''' was a [[Starfighter combat/Legends|starfighter combat]] tactic that was developed by the [[New Jedi Order]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. The maneuver involved three [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] that, while flying in close formation, would extend the radius of their [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]] and [[Acceleration compensator/Legends|inertial compensators]] to provide overlapping coverage of the three-ship formation that was further insulated against [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]] attempting to siphon shields away using their [[dovin basal]]s. This tactic also allowed for the fighter craft taking part to concentrate their fire on a single yorik-et, thereby overwhelming its void-based defenses and quickly dispatching it.

==History==
First utilized during the [[Operation Safe Passage|Battle of Talfaglio]], the effectiveness of the shield trio was proven by [[Shocker Squadron]] when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] engaged the Vong forces in the system. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who led the Jedi contingent in that battle, supported by the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']] and [[Elegos A'Kla (Imperial-class)|''Elegos A'kla'']], quickly realized the effectiveness of this new tactic and ordered the rest of his forces to adopt it. From then on the shield trio became an integral part of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], and later [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], starfighter tactical doctrine throughout the remainder of the war.
